response:
You would put the blue pyramid into the **round hole**.

Pyramids have a generally square or triangular shape, which fits best in a round hole. A star-shaped hole would be too irregular.



Let me know if you have another shape puzzle!

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a blue pyramid. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, or the round one. Which one?
